title: Filter Bar
description: Row of controls for filtering/sorting/searching a dataset. Composes other contracts (search input, select, checkbox, buttons).

props.name: showActiveChips
props.description: Shows active filters as removable chips.

states.name: has-filters
states.description: At least one filter is active.
effects: Reset control enabled; active chips visible (if enabled).

states.name: loading
effects: Optional spinner; avoid disabling all controls unless necessary.

events.name: change
events.description: Any filter/sort/search input changes (provides new filter model).

keyboard: All controls reachable via Tab in a logical order.
Chip remove buttons are keyboard accessible and have clear labels.
aria: Group the filter bar with a label (e.g. role="region" aria-label="Filters").
If chips are shown, each remove control must have an accessible name (e.g. "Remove Status: Active").

must: Filter bar must not rely on color alone to show active filters.
Reset must be discoverable when filters are active.
should: Prefer progressive disclosure: keep primary filters visible and move advanced filters into a popover.
Persist filter state in URL or local state for usability (implementation-specific).
must_not: Do not hide active filters without a way to review them.

token_usage.notes: Use surface background if bar is on canvas.
Use control padding tokens for consistent spacing.
